title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF BARRIO PATPAT IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF MALAYBALAY, PROVINCE OF BUKIDNON, TO LAPU-LAPU.

chunks.text:
H. NO. 1464 / 65 OG No. 10, 2331 (March 10, 1969)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 5087, June 17, 1967 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF BARRIO PATPAT IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF MALAYBALAY, PROVINCE OF BUKIDNON, TO LAPU-LAPU.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of Barrio Patpat in the Municipality of Malaybalay, Province of Bukidnon, is hereby changed to Lapu-Lapu.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without Executive approval, June 17, 1967.
